---
title: "sectioned_semiring_ell_rmatvec"
generated: true
description: "Sectioned-ELL adjoint (transpose) matvec: $Y = A^{ top} X$."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.sparse.ell_sectioned`](../nitrix-sparse-ell_sectioned.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:sectioned_semiring_ell_rmatvec -->
```python
sectioned_semiring_ell_rmatvec(sectioned: SectionedELL, X: Num[Array, 'n_rows ncol'], *, semiring: Semiring[Any] = REAL) -> Num[Array, 'n_cols ncol']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:sectioned_semiring_ell_rmatvec -->
Sectioned-ELL adjoint (transpose) matvec: $Y = A^{\top} X$.

The transpose companion of [`sectioned_semiring_ell_matmul`](../nitrix-sparse-ell_sectioned/sectioned_semiring_ell_matmul.qmd).  Where
the forward gathers `B` (indexed by `n_cols`) and scatter-*sets*
each bucket's rows back to original order, the adjoint gathers `X`
(indexed by the original `n_rows`) at each bucket's source rows,
runs the per-bucket [`semiring_ell_rmatvec`](../nitrix-semiring.qmd) scatter
into the shared `n_cols` axis, and *sums* the bucket contributions.

Composing forward + adjoint gives the symmetric-part matvec
$\tfrac{1}{2}(A X + A^{\top} X)$ over a [`SectionedELL`](../nitrix-sparse-ell_sectioned/SectionedELL.qmd) --
used by the spectral solvers on bucketed adjacencies whose construction did
not preserve symmetry.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:sectioned_semiring_ell_rmatvec -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `sectioned` | `SectionedELL` | — | — | The bucketed adjacency. |
| `X` | `Num` | `n_rows` × `ncol` | — | Dense operand indexed by the original row axis, `(n_rows, ncol)`. |
| `semiring` | `Semiring[Any]` | — | `REAL` | Algebra to reduce under. **REAL only** (the additive scatter adjoint; see [`semiring_ell_rmatvec`](../nitrix-semiring.qmd)); other algebras raise. |

**Returns** `Num` — shape `n_cols` × `ncol`. The dense adjoint result, shape `(n_cols, ncol)`, summed over all bucket contributions.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:sectioned_semiring_ell_rmatvec -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n_rows` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `ncol` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `n_cols` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
